query: SELECT p.id AS partner_id, p.name AS partner_name, COUNT(pr.id) AS property_count FROM peppr_partners p LEFT JOIN peppr_properties pr ON pr.partner_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name LIMIT 10;
